title: Atenea
description: *Atenea* is a conceptual application aimed at **early treatment of mental disorders**, focusing on reducing diagnostic costs and improving outcomes. Developed during a hackathon, our team proposed using **Machine Learning algorithms** to be able to perform in-app tests, facilitating quicker interventions.
We collaborated with **health professionals** to ensure the feasibility and relevance of our concept.
I was responsible for creating the mock-up of the application, crafting a user-friendly demo.
